description_long: This object is a historical-style cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with four solid wheels. The cannon barrel is made of dark, aged metal, featuring ornate engravings and a flared muzzle. The carriage is constructed from heavy, dark wood, reinforced with metal brackets and bolts, and shows signs of wear and weathering. The wheels are also wooden, banded with metal for durability, and are attached to the carriage with visible axles. The overall design is robust, with the cannon barrel resting securely in a cradle atop the carriage. This type of vehicle would have been used in historical urban fortifications or ceremonial displays.
description: A dark metal cannon with ornate engravings mounted on a heavy wooden carriage with four solid wheels and metal reinforcements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the cannon and the symmetrical arrangement of the wheels and carriage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the cannon barrel, ornate engravings, and the rectangular wooden carriage with two visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carriage, the breech of the cannon, and the wheel arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cannon barrel, engravings, and the carriage structure with two wheels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the carriage.
attribute_armor_plating: None visible; the carriage and barrel are exposed with no additional armor plating.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; the object has a solid dark brown and black finish with bronze highlights.
